summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this shard is not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR actions are planned. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent backlog items; the already closed PR is recorded as skipped; refs missing from the compacted preflight artifact need a fresh hydrated read before classification.
